text: Radiation can cause a fire to spread by:

options.text: A) Transmitting the heat of a fire through the ship’s metal
B) Burning liquids flowing into another space
C) Heated gases flowing through ventilation systems
D) The transfer of heat across an unobstructed space

explanation: Radiation is the transfer of heat through electromagnetic waves across space, meaning it does not require direct contact or a medium to ignite nearby combustibles.
